name: Legends Club Golf Simulator Center
address: 8670 Credit River Blvd, Prior Lake, MN 55372
about: Legends Club is an 18-hole championship golf course in Prior Lake, Minnesota, featuring a comprehensive golf simulator center. The venue is open to the public and provides a mix of on-course play and indoor simulator technology. The simulator center operates with a pay-per-bay model, offering flexible hours and a full-service pro shop. Dining options are available on-site, making it a complete golf destination. The facility includes a practice range, instruction programs, and a Ping® custom fitting service to support all levels of golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium on-course experience with a comprehensive simulator center
No-cost, no-obligation Ping® custom fitting service on real grass
Full-service dining and pro shop amenities available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service Legends Grill with lunch and dinner menus available daily
Full bar service available in the Legends Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must have their own set of clubs. Club rentals are not mentioned as available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted. All refreshments must be purchased from Legends Club.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Standard pricing is based on per-hour rates for the simulator center, with no specific time estimate provided for a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers beginning golf clinics for juniors, providing clubs if needed.
